content_body: We Rented the Serendipity On Noontootla Creek. There was ten of us and our stay was over the holidays. We decided to spend the money and make some memories! We arrived to a spectacularly CLEAN home. Our fire wood was delivered and we made the best memories! The property was so beautiful and nicely kept! We are going to go back over the summer!
title: We made the best holiday memories!
